//  CAREERS
Thank you for your interest in working with us! 
Accounting & Payroll Officer (Part-Time)

The Accounting & Payroll Officer is responsible for day‑to‑day accounting operations, transactional processing, payroll administration, and month‑end close activities. The role supports accurate financial reporting and strong internal controls under the oversight of the Finance & Operations Manager.

Applications will be evaluated on a rolling basis. 
Job description and application instructions

You may want to find out about other ways to get involved. Our work is supported by a dynamic team of volunteers, and we’d love for you to join us.

LEARN MORE

Your donation helps protect the unique wilderness of Georgian Bay, now and forever.
